messages.content: me and jordan broke up last weekend and i'm just kinda sad about it

That kind of sadness makes sense — something real ended, and it takes time to settle.

What's sitting heaviest for you right now?
it was pretty mutual, nobody did anything terrible, we just wanted different things

That can actually be its own kind of hard — no clear villain, no anger to hold onto, just the quiet of something that ran its course.

What do you find yourself missing most?
still though, three years. i keep reaching for my phone to text them stuff and then remembering

That reflex is one of the more painful parts — your habits haven't caught up to the new reality yet.

Three years builds a lot of those small moments. Is there someone in your life you've been able to talk to about it?
i had a little cry tonight watching one of our old shows. felt good actually, like letting it out
That sounds like exactly the right thing for tonight. Grief needs somewhere to go, and sometimes a familiar show is the gentlest door.
i'll be ok, i know i will. just gonna be a sad few weeks and that's normal i think
That sounds like a pretty clear-eyed read on where you are. Sad and okay aren't opposites — they can sit together for a while.
